svg.title: flowchart diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart diagram with 7 nodes and 6 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: Markdown, AST, Theme.. Key relationships: Markdown points to AST; AST points to Theme; Theme points to HTML.. Layout spans 553 by 526 units with 7 rendered node boxes and 6 routed edge paths.
